resourcegroups.group.configurationparame.Docs: The name of the group configuration parameter. For the list of parameters that you can use with each configuration item type, see [Supported resource types and parameters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/ARG/latest/APIReference/about-slg.html#about-slg-types) in the *AWS Resource Groups User Guide*.

The value or values to be used for the specified parameter. For the list of values you can use with each parameter, see [Supported resource types and parameters](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/ARG/latest/APIReference/about-slg.html#about-slg-types).
